project_type: Python cognitive agent prototype with concept formation and cognitive economy
build_system: setuptools with pyproject.toml, no external dependencies beyond pytest
test_framework: pytest with flat test files in tests/ directory
verification_instructions: Run pytest, confirm all tests pass (126 existing + new tests), run the new eval runner to confirm it produces results
snapshot_or_generated_files: virtual_sia/eval/results/ directory holds JSON output from eval runs, regenerated by running eval scripts
setup_instructions: pip install -e . (editable install), then pytest tests/
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. Python 3.12 via pyenv. No external dependencies - pure Python only.
contribution_requirements: All documentation in Arabic. Follow 'Legitimate Theft' methodology for every new mechanism (Arabic template with sections: what we took, what we left, what we have now). Thefts start at 5.39. Existing 126 tests must continue passing.
key_patterns: TaskCase.create() for task cases, prototype_vN_cases.py for task sets, run_local_eval_vN.py for runners, eval/reports/ for analytics modules. FAMILY_KEYWORDS dict in service.py for classification. DEFAULT_FAMILY_SELECTIVITY and FAMILY_SELECTIVITY_STRATEGY in config.py for family config.
directory_structure: virtual_sia/core/ (objects, ontology), virtual_sia/runtime/ (task_ingress, concept_engine, economy_control, theory_runtime, etc.), virtual_sia/eval/ (task_sets, runners, reports, results, perturbations), tests/ (flat pytest files)
